title: Associate Site Reliability Engineer H1B Salary Data (2024) | H1BData.info
note: 4 records; Coinbase Associate SRE $139,500 (Mountain View CA), Red Hat $100,000 (x2), EAB Global $84,009 (Seattle WA). Coinbase is a high-growth-public tier company; its Associate SRE salary directly informs the L2 upper band.
